infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Passport Photo needs access to your photo library to select a photo for your passport photo sheet.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Passport Photo needs access to your camera to take a photo for your passport photo sheet.

plugins.photosPermission: Passport Photo needs access to your photos to create passport photo sheets.
plugins.cameraPermission: Passport Photo needs access to your camera to take passport photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Save passport photo sheets to your library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Save passport photo sheets to your library.
